seo.meta_description: Full lyrics of Madhurashtakam with Hindi meaning and English translation by Vallabhacharya.

lines.hindi: अधरं मधुरं वदनं मधुरं नयनं मधुरं हसितं मधुरम् ।
lines.roman: Adharam madhuram vadanam madhuram nayanam madhuram hasitam madhuram
lines.hindi_meaning: उनके होंठ मधुर हैं, मुख मधुर है, आँखें मधुर हैं, उनकी मुस्कान मधुर है।
lines.english: His lips are sweet, His face is sweet, His eyes are sweet, His smile is sweet.

lines.hindi: हृदयं मधुरं गमनं मधुरं मधुराधिपतेरखिलं मधुरम् ॥१॥
lines.roman: Hridayam madhuram gamanam madhuram madhuradhipaterakhilam madhuram
lines.hindi_meaning: उनका हृदय मधुर है, उनकी चाल मधुर है; मधुरता के ईश्वर (श्री कृष्ण) का सब कुछ मधुर है।
lines.english: His heart is sweet, His walk is sweet; everything about the Lord of Sweetness is sweet.

lines.hindi: वचनं मधुरं चरितं मधुरं वसनं मधुरं वलितं मधुरम् ।
lines.roman: Vachanam madhuram charitam madhuram vasanam madhuram valitam madhuram
lines.hindi_meaning: उनके वचन मधुर हैं, उनका चरित्र मधुर है, उनके वस्त्र मधुर हैं, उनकी मुद्रा मधुर है।
lines.english: His words are sweet, His character is sweet, His garments are sweet, His posture is sweet.

lines.hindi: चलितं मधुरं भ्रमितं मधुरं मधुराधिपतेरखिलं मधुरम् ॥२॥
lines.roman: Chalitam madhuram bhramitam madhuram madhuradhipaterakhilam madhuram
lines.hindi_meaning: उनका चलना मधुर है, उनका भ्रमण करना मधुर है; मधुरता के ईश्वर का सब कुछ मधुर है।
lines.english: His movements are sweet, His wandering is sweet; everything about the Lord of Sweetness is sweet.

lines.hindi: वेणुर्मधुरो रेणुर्मधुरः पाणिर्मधुरः पादौ मधुरौ ।
lines.roman: Venur madhuro renur madhurah panir madhurah padau madhurau
lines.hindi_meaning: उनकी बांसुरी मधुर है, उनके चरणों की धूल मधुर है, उनके हाथ मधुर हैं, उनके चरण मधुर हैं।
lines.english: His flute is sweet, the dust of His feet is sweet, His hands are sweet, His feet are sweet.

lines.hindi: नृत्यं मधुरं सख्यं मधुरं मधुराधिपतेरखिलं मधुरम् ॥३॥
lines.roman: Nrityam madhuram sakhyam madhuram madhuradhipaterakhilam madhuram
lines.hindi_meaning: उनका नृत्य मधुर है, उनकी मित्रता मधुर है; मधुरता के ईश्वर का सब कुछ मधुर है।
lines.english: His dance is sweet, His friendship is sweet; everything about the Lord of Sweetness is sweet.

lines.hindi: गीतं मधुरं पीतं मधुरं भुक्तं मधुरं सुप्तं मधुरम् ।
lines.roman: Geetam madhuram peetam madhuram bhuktam madhuram suptam madhuram
lines.hindi_meaning: उनके गीत मधुर हैं, उनका पीना मधुर है, उनका भोजन करना मधुर है, उनका शयन मधुर है।
lines.english: His song is sweet, His drinking is sweet, His eating is sweet, His sleeping is sweet.

lines.hindi: रूपं मधुरं तिलकं मधुरं मधुराधिपतेरखिलं मधुरम् ॥४॥
lines.roman: Roopam madhuram tilakam madhuram madhuradhipaterakhilam madhuram
lines.hindi_meaning: उनका रूप मधुर है, उनका तिलक मधुर है; मधुरता के ईश्वर का सब कुछ मधुर है।
lines.english: His form is sweet, His tilak is sweet; everything about the Lord of Sweetness is sweet.

lines.hindi: करणं मधुरं तरणं मधुरं हरणं मधुरं रमणं मधुरम् ।
lines.roman: Karanam madhuram taranam madhuram haranam madhuram ramanam madhuram
lines.hindi_meaning: उनके कार्य मधुर हैं, उनका उद्धार करना मधुर है, उनका चोरी करना (माखन) मधुर है, उनका प्रेम मधुर है।
lines.english: His deeds are sweet, His saving is sweet, His stealing is sweet, His love-play is sweet.

lines.hindi: वमितं मधुरं शमितं मधुरं मधुराधिपतेरखिलं मधुरम् ॥५॥
lines.roman: Vamitam madhuram shamitam madhuram madhuradhipaterakhilam madhuram
lines.hindi_meaning: उनके शब्द मधुर हैं, उनका शांत रहना मधुर है; मधुरता के ईश्वर का सब कुछ मधुर है।
lines.english: His utterances are sweet, His peace is sweet; everything about the Lord of Sweetness is sweet.

lines.hindi: गुञ्जा मधुरा माला मधुरा यमुना मधुरा वीची मधुरा ।
lines.roman: Gunja madhura mala madhura yamuna madhura veechi madhura
lines.hindi_meaning: उनकी गुंजा की माला मधुर है, यमुना नदी मधुर है, उसकी लहरें मधुर हैं।
lines.english: His berry necklace is sweet, His garland is sweet, the Yamuna river is sweet, its waves are sweet.

lines.hindi: सलिलं मधुरं कमलं मधुरं मधुराधिपतेरखिलं मधुरम् ॥६॥
lines.roman: Salilam madhuram kamalam madhuram madhuradhipaterakhilam madhuram
lines.hindi_meaning: उसका जल मधुर है, उसके कमल मधुर हैं; मधुरता के ईश्वर का सब कुछ मधुर है।
lines.english: Its water is sweet, its lotuses are sweet; everything about the Lord of Sweetness is sweet.

lines.hindi: गोपी मधुरा लीला मधुरा युक्तं मधुरं मुक्तं मधुरम् ।
lines.roman: Gopi madhura leela madhura yuktam madhuram muktam madhuram
lines.hindi_meaning: गोपियाँ मधुर हैं, उनकी लीलाएँ मधुर हैं, उनका मिलन मधुर है, उनका बिछड़ना मधुर है।
lines.english: His Gopis are sweet, His pastimes are sweet, union with Him is sweet, liberation from Him is sweet.

lines.hindi: दृष्टं मधुरं शिष्टं मधुरं मधुराधिपतेरखिलं मधुरम् ॥७॥
lines.roman: Drishtam madhuram shishtam madhuram madhuradhipaterakhilam madhuram
lines.hindi_meaning: उनका देखना मधुर है, उनका शिष्टाचार मधुर है; मधुरता के ईश्वर का सब कुछ मधुर है।
lines.english: His glance is sweet, His etiquette is sweet; everything about the Lord of Sweetness is sweet.

lines.hindi: गोपा मधुरा गावो मधुरा यष्टिर्मधुरा सृष्टिर्मधुरा ।
lines.roman: Gopa madhura gavo madhura yashtir madhura srishtir madhura
lines.hindi_meaning: गोप मधुर हैं, गाएं मधुर हैं, उनकी छड़ी मधुर है, उनकी सृष्टि मधुर है।
lines.english: His cowherd friends are sweet, His cows are sweet, His staff is sweet, His creation is sweet.

lines.hindi: दलितं मधुरं फलितं मधुरं मधुराधिपतेरखिलं मधुरम् ॥८॥
lines.roman: Dalitam madhuram phalitam madhuram madhuradhipaterakhilam madhuram
lines.hindi_meaning: उनका विनाश करना मधुर है, उनका फल देना मधुर है; मधुरता के ईश्वर का सब कुछ मधुर है।
lines.english: His trampling is sweet, His fruitfulness is sweet; everything about the Lord of Sweetness is sweet.

reference: Composed by Sri Vallabhacharya, describing the sweetness of Lord Krishna.
